notes: Core mechanics are present (barrels, ladders, hammers, fireballs, scoring) but barrel physics are buggy, ladder attachment is finicky, the visual representation is primitive colored rectangles rather than recognizable DK sprites, and the bonus timer killing Mario feels unfair; several logic issues exist like globalTime being incremented twice per frame.

An incredibly impressive and feature-complete canvas demake of Donkey Kong, featuring accurate mechanics like broken ladders, hammer power-ups, fall damage, and even the intro animation, though it allows mid-air movement and lacks a death trigger if you walk off the very bottom girder.

Recognizably Donkey Kong with playable movement, ladders, barrels, hammers, states and scoring, but several mechanics are inaccurate or shaky (level resets on death, odd fireball ladder logic, simplified visuals/physics, and some timing/state quirks prevent a higher score).
